prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年厦门大学在贵州省理科/物理类最低录取位次分别为约29493名、14278名、12333名、14994名、5401名。2025年位次较2024年大幅前移约9593名，竞 争急剧加剧，近两年波动极大；2021–2025年理科/物理类招生计划分别为101人、93人、102人、105人、130人；2026年计划120人，较2025年缩招10人（- 7.7%），缩招信号明确，竞争压力进一步上升。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 厦门大学为985、211、双一流高校，2026年软科中国大学主榜排名第25位，属全国顶尖综合性大学，对理科高分 考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，涉及校园安全、数学系毕业生就业困难、复试歧视本科背景等舆情；但抖音综合热度排名第5（高热），短 视频曝光量极大，报考关注度居高不下。2025年声誉评价亦为偏负面（招生情况持续恶化）；第五轮学科评估中，化学A+、海洋科学A+、生物学A+、统计学A+、 工商管理A、应用经济学A、教育学A、生态学A、数学A-、物理学A-、法学A-、社会学A-、理论经济学A-、马克思主义理论A-、化学工程与技术A-等15个学科获评A-及以上，对物理 类考生可报考的统计学类、计算机类、电子信息类、数学类、化学类、工科试验班等专业形成强力支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类2024年社会热度为推荐（偏热），电子 信息/通信为高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化为高热推荐，临床医学为推荐，这些专业与厦门大学优势学科高度匹配，进一步推高报考热度。本省2026年高考总人数约299,000人， 物理类按近年占比约70%估算约208,400人，与2025年基本持平。2026年；厦门大学位于福建省（非本省），在贵州省招生占比约1. 5%–2%；厦门城市环境优美、经济发达，对贵州考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次急剧前移的强势走势、2026年缩招7.7%带来的竞争加剧、学校顶尖层次 与多个A类学科的强劲吸引力，以及计算机/电子信息等热门专业的高热度加持，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次将继续前移（数字减小）。声誉负面形成一定缓冲但影响有限，预 测最低位次约5200名，区间4700–5700名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Xiamen University in Guizhou Province's Science/Physics category were approximately 29493, 14278, 12333, 14994, and 5401 respectively. The 2025 ranking significantly advanced by about 9593 places compared to 2024, indicating a sharp increase in competition and high volatility in recent years. Enrollment plans for Science/Physics from 2021 to 2025 were 101, 93, 102, 105, and 130 students respectively; the 2026 plan is 120 students, a reduction of 10 students (-7.7%) compared to 2025, signaling a clear contraction and further intensifying competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 25th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, making it a top-tier comprehensive university in China, with sustained strong appeal to high-scoring science students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving campus safety, employment difficulties for mathematics graduates, and discrimination against undergraduate backgrounds in re-examinations. However, its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 5th (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure and persistently high application attention. The 2025 reputation evaluation was also somewhat negative (deteriorating enrollment situation). In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, 15 disciplines received A- or above, including Chemistry A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A+, Statistics A+, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Education A, Ecology A, Mathematics A-, Physics A-, Law A-, Sociology A-, Theoretical Economics A-, Marxist Theory A-, and Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, providing strong support for Physics category applicants in fields such as Statistics, Computer Science, Electronic Information, Mathematics, Chemistry, and Engineering Experimental Classes.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of Computer Science is recommended (somewhat hot), Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended and hot, Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended and hot, and Clinical Medicine is recommended. These majors align well with Xiamen University's advantageous disciplines, further boosting application enthusiasm. The total number of Gaokao examinees in the province in 2026 is approximately 299,000, with Physics category estimated at about 208,400 based on a recent proportion of about 70%, roughly unchanged from 2025. Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province (not the home province), with an enrollment share in Guizhou of about 1.5%–2%. Xiamen's beautiful urban environment and developed economy exert a strong regional appeal to Guizhou examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong upward trend of the 2025 ranking, intensified competition due to a 7.7% enrollment reduction in 2026, the university's top-tier status and strong appeal of multiple A-level disciplines, and the high popularity of majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics category in 2026 will continue to advance (numerical decrease). Negative reputation provides some buffer but has limited impact. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5200, with a range of 4700–5700.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Statistics (including dual degree program selection)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI and Computer Science)
- Accounting (Accounting, Finance, Auditing, including dual degree program selection).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Integrated Circuits and Electronic Information)
- Mathematics (including Jingrun Top Talent Class selection)
- Economics (including dual degree program selection)
- Clinical Medicine.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Engineering and Materials)
- Chemistry (including National Chemistry Top Talent Base selection)
- Science Experimental Class (Life Sciences and Medical Health)
- Architecture (Human Settlement Science and Innovation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 5200, with a range of 4700–5700. Candidates near the upper limit of the range (5700) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Statistics, AI and Computer Science, and Accounting. Candidates in the middle of the range (around 5200) should prioritize Tier 2 majors with a sprint for Tier 1. Candidates near the lower limit (4700) can boldly aim for all Tier 1 majors. Tier 3 majors serve as safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Xiamen University in Guizhou Province for liberal arts/history category were approximately 3489, 1511, 1871, 2022, and 753 respectively. The 2025 ranking moved significantly forward by about 1269 places compared to 2024, indicating intensified competition and drastic fluctuations in recent years. Enrollment plans for liberal arts/history category from 2021 to 2025 were 22, 22, 21, 23, and 30 respectively; the 2026 plan is 27, a reduction of 3 (-10%) compared to 2025, signaling a clear contraction and further increasing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 25th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, belonging to the top-tier comprehensive universities in China, with strong and sustained appeal to high-scoring students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving campus safety, employment difficulties for mathematics graduates, and discrimination against undergraduate backgrounds in re-examinations. However, its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 5th (high heat), with massive short video exposure and persistently high application attention. In 2025, the reputation evaluation was also somewhat negative (deteriorating enrollment situation), but no major negative events occurred. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 14 disciplines including Chemistry A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A+, Statistics A+, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Education A, and Ecology A were rated A- or above, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength, providing solid support for liberal arts/history category applicants in majors such as Accounting (Business Administration A), Economics (Applied Economics A), Journalism and Communication, and Law (Law A-).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of accounting/finance/auditing is recommended (somewhat hot), law is divided and wait-and-see, and journalism and communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in this province is approximately 299,000, with history category estimated at about 90,600 based on a recent proportion of about 30%, roughly the same as 2025, indicating a stable candidate pool. Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province (not this province), with an enrollment proportion in Guizhou of about 1.5%–2%, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Fujian Province is a developed coastal province, and Xiamen city has strong appeal, providing some regional preference advantage for Guizhou candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong upward trend of the 2025 ranking moving significantly forward, the intensified competition due to a 10% enrollment reduction in 2026, the sustained appeal of the university's top tier and advantageous disciplines, and the high Douyin attention, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the history category in 2026 will continue to move forward (number decreasing). However, negative reputation incidents and a stable candidate pool provide some buffer. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 723, with a range of 620–826.
